TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ryan_Bowen, title = Ryan_Bowen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ryan_Bowen} }

S.FORM: Ryan Bowen sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1975, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 11, Ryan Bowen, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Ryan Bowen sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1975, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 11, Ryan Bowen, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: rjan βowen s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, rjan βowen, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
